children.text: the contracts and subcontracts and their dollar values for which the Administrator determines that essential goods or services under the contract are available only from a source outside the United States; and

the items and their dollar values for which the Buy American Act ( et seq.) was waived pursuant to obligations of the United States under international agreements.41 U.S.C. 10a1See References in Text note below.1
